key_points.text: U.S. authorities are preparing tightened export controls that would restrict NVIDIA's advanced-chip sales to China, a market that represents a meaningful share of data-center revenue, potentially forcing inventory write-downs and near-term guidance cuts

NVIDIA launched a new inference platform with several marquee customers committing to early adoption and described as encouraging early order momentum, which reinforces its data-center competitive position and broadens addressable market beyond training
